info.title: Atomy-Q API
info.description:
Atomy-Q Quote Comparison API — generated OpenAPI for client tooling (design-partner alpha).

### Idempotency error `code` values

JSON error bodies may include a string `code` for clients and tooling. Idempotency-related values:

| `code` | HTTP | Meaning |
|--------|------|---------|
| `idempotency_key_required` | 400 | `Idempotency-Key` header missing or empty |
| `idempotency_key_invalid` | 400 | Key failed validation (e.g. length) |
| `idempotency_fingerprint_conflict` | 409 | Same key, different request body |
| `idempotency_in_progress` | 409 | Same key; prior attempt not finished |
| `idempotency_operation_ref_missing` | 500 | Route has no name (misconfiguration) |
| `idempotency_tenant_missing` | 500 | Tenant not on request after auth |
| `idempotency_replay_missing` | 500 | Replay outcome without stored payload |
| `idempotency_record_missing` | 500 | Internal idempotency state inconsistency |
| `idempotency_envelope_too_large` | 500 | Response too large to store for replay |

get.description: Query: type, status, priority, page, per_page

post.description:
Tenant is taken from the user row (one user → one tenant). `tenant_id` in the body is ignored.

POST /auth/login
post.summary: Authenticate user with email and password, return JWT tokens
Initiate SSO flow, return redirect URL

message.const: MFA verification flow is not implemented yet.

post.description: POST /auth/forgot-password — body: `email` only. Reset tokens are stored per user tenant (from the user row).

message.const: If an account exists for this email, password reset instructions have been sent.

post.summary: Complete password reset using email + token from the forgot-password mail

message.const: Unable to complete password reset. Please try again later.

post.summary: Refresh access token using valid refresh token

message.const: Logout flow is not implemented yet.

post.summary: Trust the current device for simplified future authentication

message.const: Device trust flow is not implemented yet.

Method named final_ since final is reserved in PHP.

get.description:
GET /documents
Query: type, rfq_id, vendor_id, tags, page, per_page

get.summary: Get document download URL or redirect

post.description: Method name validate_ to avoid reserved word.
Start a new negotiation round. Returns 201.

post.summary: Start a generic operational approval (distinct from RFQ quote approvals)

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required on idempotent POST operations. Non-empty string, max 256 characters. Same key + same request fingerprint replays the stored response; same key + different body returns 409 with `code` `idempotency_fingerprint_conflict`.

get.summary:
GET /quote-submissions
Params: status, rfq_id, vendor_id, page, per_page
Scoped by tenant_id

post.summary:
POST /quote-submissions/upload
Scoped by tenant_id. Requires rfq_id, vendor_id, and an uploaded file

get.summary:
GET /quote-submissions/:id
Two-tab detail data.
Scoped by tenant_id

patch.summary:

Update quote ingestion state.
Scoped by tenant_id
